purpose: Compares possible future payment provider categories without enabling live payment integration.

provider_categories.label: India-focused payment gateway
provider_categories.fit: Best for INR subscriptions, UPI/cards/netbanking, and India-first launch.

provider_categories.label: Global subscription provider
provider_categories.fit: Useful if Drishvara later targets international subscribers.

provider_categories.label: Manual / invite-only subscription
provider_categories.fit: Useful for early controlled pilots with known subscribers before automated payments.

guardrails: Do not store card details in Drishvara database.
Use provider-hosted checkout or secure payment flow.
Webhook verification is mandatory before updating subscription status.
Never expose provider secret keys in frontend code.
